_meta.note: Required-reason API categories and Apple's approved reason codes (summarized — verify against Apple's docs before declaring).

itms.ITMS-91053: Missing API declaration: your app (or code compiled into it) calls a required-reason API, but no privacy manifest in the bundle declares an approved reason for that category.
itms.ITMS-91061: Missing privacy manifest: a third-party SDK on Apple's list ships in your app without its own PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy. Update the SDK to a version that includes one.
itms.ITMS-91056: Invalid privacy manifest: a PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy in your app has invalid keys or values — usually a malformed NSPrivacyAccessedAPITypes entry.

NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategoryUserDefaults.label: UserDefaults
NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategoryUserDefaults.trigger: Reading or writing NSUserDefaults / UserDefaults (Flutter shared_preferences, RN AsyncStorage and many settings libraries do this under the hood).

reasons.CA92.1: Read/write info accessible only to the app itself (the common case)
reasons.1C8F.1: Read/write info shared within your own app group
reasons.C56D.1: Third-party SDK wrapper around UserDefaults (SDK's own manifest)
reasons.AC6B.1: Read managed-configuration keys set by MDM

NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategoryFileTimestam.label: File timestamps
NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategoryFileTimestam.trigger: Reading file creation/modification dates (stat, attributesOfItem — file managers, caches, react-native-fs, expo-file-system).

reasons.C617.1: Timestamps of files inside the app's own container (the common case)
reasons.3B52.1: Timestamps of files the user explicitly granted access to

NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategorySystemBootTi.label: System boot time / uptime
NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategorySystemBootTi.trigger: systemUptime, mach_absolute_time — often used for performance timing.

reasons.35F9.1: Measure time elapsed inside the app (the common case)
reasons.8FFB.1: Calculate absolute event timestamps for on-device processing
reasons.3D61.1: Include in an opt-in bug report

NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategoryDiskSpace.label: Available disk space
NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategoryDiskSpace.trigger: Querying free/total disk capacity (download managers, cache managers, react-native-device-info).

reasons.85F4.1: Display disk space to the user
reasons.E174.1: Check space before writing files (the common case)
reasons.7D9E.1: Include in an opt-in bug report

reasons.3EC4.1: App is itself a custom keyboard app
reasons.54BD.1: Present the correct customized UI (on-device processing only)
